name: Ham and Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Melt the margarine in a saucepan over medium heat.
4. Stir in flour and pepper until no lumps remain.
5. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
6. Cook, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens.
7. Remove from heat and stir in chopped onions, cooked potatoes, and diced ham.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
9. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top.
10. Bake for 45 minutes or until heated through and lightly browned on top.
